variants.title: HiFi Filter SAT 23SAM102003 Straight Hose
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAT 23SAM102003 Straight Hose. Easy to install and replace, the SAT 23SAM102003 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
